name: Lucid Group, Inc.
summary: Lucid Group, Inc. is a technology company that designs, develops, manufactures, and sells electric vehicles. Its products include the Lucid Air sedan (deliveries began late 2021) and the Lucid Gravity SUV (launched late 2024). The company also develops advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS) and Level 4 autonomous mobility technology, and operates Advanced Manufacturing Plant-1 (AMP-1) in Casa Grande, Arizona, with a planned AMP-2 facility in Saudi Arabia.

products.name: Lucid Air
products.description: Award-winning electric sedan with customer deliveries beginning late 2021, featuring advanced performance, range, and efficiency.

products.name: Lucid Gravity
products.description: Electric SUV that arrived on the road in late 2024, advancing state-of-the-art EV standards.

products.name: Lucid Space Concept
products.description: Miniaturized drivetrain architecture enabling smaller exterior footprint with leading interior cabin space.

products.name: ADAS / Autonomous Mobility Systems
products.description: Advanced driver assistance and Level 4 eyes-off, hands-off, mind-off autonomous mobility systems for consumer and ride-hailing applications.

products.name: ZEV Credits
products.description: Zero Emission Vehicle credits generated and utilized as part of regulatory compliance and revenue strategy.

partnerships.description: Partnership referenced as a key relationship for technology or platform collaboration.
Partnership referenced in context of ride-hailing autonomous mobility applications.
Partnership referenced in context of autonomous mobility systems.
Partnership leveraging Lucid's software and hardware architecture for next-generation autonomous systems.
Controlling stockholder; entered Series A and Series B Convertible Preferred Stock subscription agreements with Lucid.
